Tines 

What do you think? …

Abdullah Javaid [...] Upvoted, curious how big the board gets after today.

Varun Mishra

This is a fun way to spot who's consistently building in public instead of relying on follower counts alone. The weekly growers view sounds especially useful for discovering startups before they become obvious. [...] Tines 

What do you think? …

Abdullah Javaid

Fun idea and it loads fast. Watching T3 Chat sit at number 1 makes the ranking feel instantly believable, and the YC batch filter is a smart touch for checking who is loud in your batch. Spent about ten minutes poking around before commenting.

One thing that tripped me: the search box reads like I can look up any X account, but it only matches accounts already on the board, and it seems to match website domains too. I typed vercel and got one random person whose portfolio is hosted on vercel.app instead of anything Vercel related. Matching handle and display name first would fix that. Also the 24H column is all dashes right now, might be worth hiding it until the data lands.

Upvoted, curious how big the board gets after today.

# peaq teams up with Kaito to power Get Real’s Yapper Leaderboard

peaq teams up with Kaito to power Get Real’s Yapper Leaderboard.jpg)

peaq

Community

xlinkedin

peaq

Community

xlinkedin

Disclaimer: This blog was updated on August 26th, 2025 to include the Code of Conduct for the Get Real Yapper Leaderboard.

Growing the Machine Economy isn’t just about building — it’s about sharing, amplifying, and getting the word out.

That’s where the Get Real Yapper Leaderboard comes in. [...] Get Real was always designed to give everyone a chance — rewarding both everyday participants and those with high reach, with separate leaderboards for both to ensure an even playing field. The Get Real Yapper Leaderboard is focused on people with larger platforms and stronger social reach, giving them a dedicated space to compete for rewards. That way, those without massive audiences still have an equal shot at boosting their rewards via social quests when Season 2 launches later in the year.

‍

## The Breakdown: Seasons, Rewards, and Allocation

The Get Real Yapper Leaderboard is live now. It will run for 11 months.

In total, 0.55% of peaq’s genesis supply is allocated to the Get Real Yapper Leaderboard and will be distributed to top participants over the course of these 11 months. [...] Important: Accounts breaking these guidelines or found to be using other exploits will be reviewed and may be removed from the leaderboard and disqualified from receiving rewards in all future Get Real Yapper Leaderboard Seasons. The rules apply from Month 2 (August 2025) and on.

Additionally, Kaito has introduced a new reputation threshold to further bolster the quality of the campaigns on the platform. Only higher-reputation accounts will be qualified for the Creator Leaderboard. The platform is also introducing stronger anti-farming filters, which will also help to ensure only quality content scores.

‍

## Get Loud, Get Rewards

The Get Real Yapper Leaderboard is the perfect opportunity to earn rewards simply for helping spread the word about the Machine Economy.

results.title: Announcing the dYdX Yapper Leaderboard
results.content:
This is dYdX’s first major SocialFi activation, a program designed to reward culture carriers, surface emerging voices, and amplify the stories that move the ecosystem forward.

→ View the live leaderboard

## What is the Yapper Leaderboard?

The Yapper Leaderboard is a real-time scoreboard that highlights which accounts are contributing the most Mindshare to the dYdX ecosystem.

Mindshare measures the share of voice an individual account brings to a project. It’s not about shouting the loudest or tweeting the most, it’s about the quality of the content, the focus of the commentary, and the authenticity of the engagement.

Using Kaito’s intelligence engine, the leaderboard rewards: [...] ## Leaving site [...] Does posting about multiple projects help me across leaderboards?Not necessarily. The algorithm rewards focus. Accounts consistently aligned with dYdX tend to perform better than those spreading content thinly across many projects.

Is content in other languages ranked equally?Yes. Kaito uses multilingual models that evaluate content fairly across all languages.

Do I earn Yap Points for this?No. The dYdX Yapper Leaderboard is separate from the general Kaito Yap Points system. It specifically measures contribution to dYdX’s ecosystem, not broader Crypto Twitter activity.

## Final Thoughts

The Yapper Leaderboard is designed to recognize thoughtful, creative, and value-driven participation, and, for the first time, to reward it.
